name: Oh Dear
description: Oh Dear — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Uptime Monitoring.

seo.title: Oh Dear Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Oh Dear analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Oh Dear is a Observability / Logging / Tracing tool.
pros: Unified monitoring across logs, metrics, and traces
cons: Costs scale steeply with data ingestion volume
